name: PMEGP
target_description: Any individual above 18 for NEW micro enterprise setup. Also SHGs, societies registered under Societies Registration Act 1860, production cooperative societies, charitable trusts.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MoMSME)
data_source: PMEGP Guidelines Final (official PDF from KVIC-Ministry of MSME)

rules.description: Applicant must be at least 18 years of age
Applicant must not have an existing enterprise — only new projects are eligible
rules.ambiguity_note: ONLY for NEW projects. Existing units and units already under PMRY/REGP/any govt subsidy scheme NOT eligible.

rules.description: Applicant must not be a government employee
For projects above ₹10L manufacturing or ₹5L service: must be at least 8th standard pass (age proxy: 14+)
rules.ambiguity_note: For projects above ₹10L manufacturing or ₹5L service: must be at least 8th standard pass.

rules.description: Only one person per family (self and spouse) is eligible
rules.ambiguity_note: Only one person from one family (self + spouse) eligible.

required_documents.document: Education Certificate (8th pass — if project above ₹10L manufacturing)
Aadhaar or PAN or Bank Account Number

benefit_summary: Margin money subsidy 15-35% of project cost. General: 15% urban / 25% rural. SC/ST/OBC/Women/Ex-servicemen/PwD/NER/Hill/Border: 25% urban / 35% rural. Manufacturing max project ₹25 lakh. Service/Business max ₹10 lakh. No collateral for loans up to ₹10 lakh.
